title: oxalis albicans
intro: Oxalis albicans, also known as the desert sweetshop or white wood-sorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat urinary tract infections due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is rich in ascorbic acid and anthraquinones, which provide various health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as the potential to treat conditions like constipation and digestive issues. Oxalis albicans can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
